items.title: Spotting & brief
items.desc: We talk through your film, the feeling you're after, and exactly where music should land.

items.title: First sketch, fast
items.desc: I send an early musical pass so you can react right away. Then we shape it together.

items.title: Final mix, delivered
items.desc: You get polished, fully-cleared music, mixed and ready to drop straight into your edit.
